overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night drive along an elevated highway through a neon-lit futuristic city. The camera moves steadily forward as flying vehicles pass overhead and the urban landscape transitions from dense skyscrapers to highway infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with futuristic city skyline view

events.description: flying vehicle descends from upper right and passes overhead
city skyline begins to recede as highway continues forward

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the elevated highway, observing the neon-lit cityscape on the left

notable_agents.action: flying car with underglow passing overhead from right to left

entered.detail: tall futuristic buildings with bright neon advertisements and holographic billboards illuminating the rainy night
concrete safety barrier running along the left edge of the elevated highway
futuristic hovering vehicle with glowing undercarriage descending from the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked elevated highway with a stunning view of a futuristic cyberpunk city skyline to the left, featuring towering glass buildings covered in neon advertisements. A flying vehicle descends and passes overhead around the 6-second mark, adding to the sci-fi atmosphere as the camera continues driving forward into the night.

events.description: passing vertical support pillar on the left side of the highway
passing under the first large highway overpass structure

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway as the dense cityscape recedes into the background

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure with illuminated underside spanning across the highway
tall street lamp casting bright light on the wet road surface
tall metal lattice tower with multiple power lines extending across the scene

segments.scene_description: As the city skyline fades into the background, the highway continues through increasingly industrial infrastructure. The camera passes under the first large overpass around 25 seconds, with street lights and power transmission towers becoming prominent features against the dark rainy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor between overpasses with industrial elements

events.description: passing under the second overpass structure

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the rain-slicked highway between overpass structures

entered.detail: second concrete overpass structure with bright linear lighting underneath
large illuminated advertising screen visible on the right side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through a corridor of infrastructure, passing under a second overpass and moving past a large billboard screen. The power transmission tower recedes into the distance on the left as the environment becomes more enclosed by highway architecture.

events.description: oncoming ground vehicle with headlights appears in the distance
passing under the final underpass structure and approaching the oncoming vehicle

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing an oncoming vehicle while driving through the underpass

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with bright headlights driving in the opposite direction

entered.detail: enclosed underpass structure with bright overhead lighting creating a tunnel-like effect
oncoming ground car with illuminated headlights approaching on the wet highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the camera entering a more enclosed underpass section of the highway where an oncoming vehicle with bright headlights approaches from the distance. The scene is dominated by artificial lighting from the underpass structure as the camera passes the oncoming car and continues into the depths of the highway infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked elevated highway that transitions from a sprawling neon skyline into a claustrophobic industrial corridor. It begins with a view of towering glass buildings and vibrant advertisements to the left, as a flying vehicle descends and passes overhead. As the city skyline fades, the environment shifts toward heavy infrastructure, moving the camera under a massive overpass flanked by street lights and power transmission towers. The scene then tightens into a corridor of highway architecture, passing a large billboard screen before the transmission towers recede into the distance. Finally, the camera enters an enclosed underpass dominated by artificial lighting, passing an oncoming vehicle with bright headlights as it plunges deeper into the urban infrastructure.
